text:
気遣い無用といわんばかりね。
アンタの体力、底なしだわ。

ちょっとぐらいへばってみせた方が
かわいげあるし、優しくもできるのに
……まったくもう！

じゃあ次、この課題ならどう！
元へっぽこぴーのアンタに
これがクリアでき

Okay, this whole "I have infinite stamina and
complete any task" thing is getting old.

You'd be cuter if you let yourself look a little
worn out. Then I could be nice to you with a
clear conscience. I mean, for crying out loud!

How's THIS for your next assignment?
Should be no problem for a reformed
"circus entertainment professional" like you!
